name: WYTEC INTERNATIONAL INC
summary: . General Wytec is a designer and developer of wide area networks (WAN) designed to support 5G network deployments utilized in multiple Internet of Things (IoT) solutions across the United States. In June 2014, we filed a provisional patent for our small cell technology, which we call the LPN-16, and in December 2017 we were granted a patent by the United States Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO), patent number 9,807,032.
